title: Incorrect result when a LEFT JOIN provides the qualifying constraint for a partial index
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE Users(ID UInt32, Name String, Age Nullable(UInt32));
INSERT INTO Users(Name, Age) VALUES('Bob', NULL);
CREATE TABLE Orders(OrderID UInt32, UserID UInt32, Item String);
SELECT Users.Name, Orders.Item FROM Users LEFT JOIN Orders ON Users.ID = Orders.UserID WHERE Users.Age > 25 ORDER BY Users.Name;
key_bug_features: LEFT JOIN with ORDER BY causes incorrect result
